source.name: Immigration New Zealand — Student fund requirements

extraSources.name: Immigration New Zealand — Fee Paying Student Visa

requirements.label: Offer of place
requirements.detail: An offer of place from an NZQA-approved education provider for an approved course.

requirements.label: Funds requirement
requirements.detail: Show NZD 20,000 per year (or NZD 1,667/month for courses under a year) for living costs, plus tuition and onward-travel funds.

requirements.label: Onward travel funds
requirements.detail: Evidence you can leave New Zealand (e.g. a ticket or sufficient funds for one).

requirements.label: Medical & travel insurance
requirements.detail: Acceptable insurance covering your stay is required for international students.

requirements.label: English language proof
requirements.detail: IELTS/TOEFL/PTE as your provider and visa require.

requirements.label: Valid passport
requirements.detail: A passport valid for your intended stay.

requirements.label: Medical / chest X-ray
requirements.detail: Required depending on your country and length of stay.

requirements.label: Police certificate
requirements.detail: Often required for stays over 24 months.

requirements.label: Tuition / funds transfer
requirements.detail: Transfer tuition or living funds with a low-FX provider.

requirements.label: Connectivity on arrival
requirements.detail: An eSIM gives you a New Zealand number and data on landing.

requirements.label: Accommodation
requirements.detail: Arrange housing early, especially in Auckland and Wellington.
